title: After the Debut: Bring the Brat

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Sweep Tosho successfully finishes her
debut race, it's clear that her sense of frustration
kept her from being able to concentrate on
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When a reporter asks her what her next goal race
is, her answer is blunt: the Hanshin J.F. When the
reporter chastises her attitude, her mood only
sours further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, she shuts herself in the waiting room
and falls asleep. For now, I decide to keep her
next goal as the Hanshin J.F.
